universal_benefits.name: Mastercard Zero Liability Protection
universal_benefits.notes: Cardholder is not held responsible for unauthorized transactions made in store, by phone, online, in app, or at ATMs, provided the cardholder used reasonable care and promptly reported loss/theft. Does not apply to commercial cards or unregistered prepaid cards.

source.label: Mastercard US — Zero Liability Protection

universal_benefits.name: Mastercard ID Theft Protection
universal_benefits.notes: Free identity-theft monitoring across surface/dark/deep web, single-bureau (TransUnion) credit monitoring, and access to a resolution specialist. Provided by Iris Powered by Generali; cardholder must enroll to receive coverage.

source.label: Mastercard ID Theft Protection — Enrollment portal

universal_benefits.name: Mastercard Global Service
universal_benefits.notes: 24/7 worldwide assistance for lost/stolen card reporting, emergency card replacement and emergency cash advance. US/Canada toll-free 1-800-307-7309; collect from outside US +1-636-722-7111.

source.label: Mastercard US — Safety and Security Benefits

universal_benefits.name: Mastercard Public Transit Tap & Go Benefit
universal_benefits.notes: $2.50 statement credit when an eligible US Mastercard cardholder taps to pay $10 or more in a calendar month at participating transit systems (MBTA Boston, CTA/Pace Chicago, DART Dallas, Miami-Dade, NJ Transit, PATH, SEPTA, WMATA). Limit one credit per cardholder per month.

source.label: Mastercard US — Cardholder Benefits & Services

universal_benefits.name: Mastercard Music & Entertainment Access (Presale tickets)
universal_benefits.notes: Exclusive access to ticket presales at top US venues and festivals. Cardholder enters first 6 digits of an eligible Mastercard consumer credit card as the offer passcode at checkout via Ticketmaster/TicketWeb. Not available to business/commercial Mastercards.

source.label: Mastercard US — World Mastercard benefits page (Music & Entertainment terms)

tier_specific_benefits.name: Mastercard Travel & Lifestyle Services
tier_specific_benefits.notes: World Elite suite operated by Ten Lifestyle Group plc. Includes Lowest Hotel Rate Guarantee, Hotel Stay Guarantee, complimentary 24/7 Lifestyle Manager, and access to the Mastercard Luxury Hotels & Resorts portfolio (3,000+ properties) with daily breakfast for two, room upgrade and $50–$100 amenity credit when available.

source.label: Mastercard Guide to Benefits — World Elite Mastercard (network template)

tier_specific_benefits.name: World Elite Concierge Service
tier_specific_benefits.notes: 24/7/365 personal concierge for travel planning, dining/entertainment reservations, ticket sourcing, gift research and pre-trip planning. Reachable at 1-877-354-8330. Goods/services purchased are billed to the cardholder's World Elite Mastercard.

source.label: Mastercard Guide to Benefits — World Elite Mastercard (Concierge section)

tier_specific_benefits.name: Mastercard Airport Concierge
tier_specific_benefits.notes: 15% discount on Airport Meet & Greet services at 700+ airports worldwide (departure, arrival or connecting). Cardholder pays the discounted fee out of pocket; Mastercard does not cover the service cost.

source.label: Mastercard Guide to Benefits — World Elite Mastercard (Airport Concierge section)

tier_specific_benefits.name: Mastercard Golf / Priceless Golf
tier_specific_benefits.notes: World Elite cardholders get access to a Golf Concierge Service, preferred tee times at participating TPC Network courses, PGA TOUR experiences and access to Open Championship/AIG Women's Open hospitality offers via Priceless.

source.label: Priceless.com — PGA TOUR collection

tier_specific_benefits.name: Priceless Experiences
tier_specific_benefits.notes: Marketplace of curated experiences (culinary, arts, sports, travel) bookable with any Mastercard, with select experiences gated to World Elite and World Legend tiers across 45+ destinations.

source.label: priceless.com homepage

tier_specific_benefits.name: World Elite Mastercard Digital Merchant Offers
tier_specific_benefits.notes: Aggregated landing page that lists current digital-merchant offers (Peacock, Instacart, Lyft, etc.) available to US-issued World Elite Mastercard cardholders. Offers and terms vary; specific offers tracked separately below.

source.label: Mastercard Guide to Benefits — World Elite Mastercard (Digital Merchant Offers)

tier_specific_benefits.name: Peacock $3 Monthly Statement Credit
tier_specific_benefits.notes: $3.00 monthly statement credit when an eligible World Elite or World Legend Mastercard is the payment method on a full-priced Peacock Premium or Peacock Premium Plus monthly subscription purchased directly from Peacock. No opt-in required; auto-applied via Mastercard Rewards System. Excludes Apple Card and certain co-brands.

source.label: Peacock — World Elite and World Legend Mastercard offer

tier_specific_benefits.name: Instacart+ 3 Free Months and $10 Off Second Order Monthly
tier_specific_benefits.notes: New Instacart+ members with an eligible World, World Elite or World Legend Mastercard receive 3 free months of Instacart+; all eligible cardholders get $10 off their second qualifying Instacart order each calendar month.

source.label: Mastercard US — World Elite Mastercard benefits page (Instacart terms)

tier_specific_benefits.name: Lyft Take 3, Get $5 Credit
tier_specific_benefits.notes: Take three Eligible Lyft rides paid for at least in part with an eligible World, World Elite or World Legend Mastercard in a calendar month and receive a $5 Lyft credit. Limit one credit per Lyft account per month; credits expire 30 days after issuance. Excludes business profile rides, bike/scooter rentals and Apple Card.

source.label: Lyft — Earn and save with Mastercard

tier_specific_benefits.name: Lyft 10% Off Scheduled Airport Rides
tier_specific_benefits.notes: 10% off Lyft Scheduled Rides to/from qualifying US (incl. Puerto Rico) airports when paid in full with a World Elite or World Legend consumer Mastercard. Discount is reflected at booking; physical card must be linked, digital wallets and Apple Card excluded.

source.label: Lyft Help — World, World Elite, World Legend Mastercard

earn_channels.name: Mastercard Travel Rewards
earn_channels.how_to_access: Cardholder registers an eligible Mastercard at mtr.mastercardservices.com; offers automatically apply as statement-credit cashback when the registered card is used at a participating merchant (in the local currency of the offer) while traveling internationally or shopping online.
earn_channels.eligibility: Available on select US-issued World Elite and World Legend Mastercard consumer and small-business products; participation is at the issuer's discretion. Cash-back posts on the issuer's regular billing statement.
earn_channels.notes: Country-specific cashback rates and category mixes (dining, hotel, transportation, retail) are not published on the unauthenticated portal landing page; rates are visible only after registration. Mastercard.com confirms the program is for cardholders 'when traveling internationally and shopping from your home.'

source.label: Mastercard Travel Rewards — registration portal

earn_channels.name: Mastercard Travel (booking site)
earn_channels.how_to_access: Mastercard Travel & Lifestyle Services site (travel.mastercard.com) and US arrival-guide portal (travel.mastercard.us) are the primary booking surfaces; bookings made by Lifestyle Manager phone agents.
earn_channels.eligibility: World Elite and World Legend Mastercard cardholders.
earn_channels.notes: The Mastercard Travel booking platform delivers value through hotel benefits (free breakfast, $50–$100 amenity credit, upgrade), Lowest Hotel Rate Guarantee and Hotel Stay Guarantee. It does NOT publish a network-wide bonus earn rate above the issuer's native rate; cardholders earn whatever rate the issuer credits for travel/hotel spend.

source.label: Mastercard Travel & Lifestyle Services — terms page

earn_channels.name: Priceless Specials / priceless.com Offers
earn_channels.how_to_access: Cardholder browses experiences/offers at priceless.com and pays with any Mastercard at checkout; some experiences are gated to World Elite, World Legend or other tiers.
earn_channels.eligibility: Open to any Mastercard cardholder, with tier-restricted listings on certain experiences.
earn_channels.notes: Priceless is a curated experience marketplace, not a points-earning portal. There is no incremental cash-back rate; value comes from access (presales, member-for-a-day club access) and curated pricing.

source.label: priceless.com — Mastercard Priceless homepage

earn_channels.name: Mastercard Easy Savings
earn_channels.how_to_access: Issuer enrolls eligible US-issued small-business Mastercard accounts; cashback rebates auto-post when registered card is used at participating merchants.
earn_channels.eligibility: Mastercard Small Business credit/debit cards. NOT applicable to consumer World Elite Mastercards including the Citi Strata Premier.
earn_channels.notes: Easy Savings is positioned for small-business cards and is not relevant to a consumer Citi Strata Premier overlay; flagged here for completeness so the recommendation engine knows not to surface it for this card.

source.label: Mastercard US — Small Business Offers page

destination_benefits.name: Priceless United States
destination_benefits.notes: Filtered country page listing live US experiences across multiple cities (155 results live as of verification).

source.label: priceless.com — United States filter

destination_benefits.name: Priceless New York
destination_benefits.notes: City-filter page for New York experiences on Priceless.com; live experiences include culinary, arts and culture, sports.

source.label: priceless.com — New York filter

destination_benefits.name: Priceless Chicago
destination_benefits.notes: Chicago city filter on Priceless.com; only 1 live experience returned at verification, so program presence is thin in this market.

source.label: priceless.com — Chicago filter

destination_benefits.name: Priceless Los Angeles

current_experiences.title: Walk a downtown LA architecture tour with creator Drew Tillman

destination_benefits.notes: Los Angeles is one of the four US cities promoted on the Priceless homepage filter strip.

source.label: priceless.com — LA experience listing on homepage

destination_benefits.name: Priceless Miami
destination_benefits.notes: Miami is listed as a featured city in the Priceless.com global filter set.

source.label: priceless.com — homepage city filter strip

destination_benefits.name: Priceless Golf / PGA TOUR Collection

current_experiences.title: Play where the pros play at TPC Boston
TPC Collection — privileged member-for-a-day perks at TPC courses

destination_benefits.notes: Golf-themed experience hub on priceless.com; bookable by World Elite cardholders via the Mastercard Golf Concierge Service.

source.label: priceless.com — PGA TOUR collection

insurance_protection.name: MasterRental Coverage (Auto Rental CDW)
insurance_protection.notes: Reimburses physical damage, theft, vandalism, collision and overturn on a Rental Vehicle when the entire rental is paid with the Covered Card and the rental agency's CDW is declined. Limit: lesser of contractual liability, ACV, repair cost, R&C, or rental agency invoice; up to $500 loss-of-use; up to two tows. Coverage is SECONDARY in the US, PRIMARY outside the cardholder's country of residence. Maximum 31 consecutive rental days. Excludes trucks, full-size vans, exotic/expensive cars, antiques, off-road use and rideshare/livery use. Administered by Sedgwick / underwritten by New Hampshire Insurance Company (AIG).

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits (effective 2024-05-12) — MasterRental EOC

insurance_protection.name: Common Carrier Trip Cancellation & Trip Interruption
insurance_protection.notes: Reimburses non-refundable Common Carrier fares charged to the Covered Card when the Eligible Traveler or Family Member experiences accidental bodily injury, sickness or death (Pre-existing conditions excluded). Maximum benefit $5,000 per Covered Trip and $10,000 per Eligible Account per 12 consecutive months. Secondary coverage. Round-trips up to 365 days; helicopter Common Carrier excluded.

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits — Common Carrier Trip Cancellation/Interruption EOC

insurance_protection.name: Trip Delay Reimbursement
insurance_protection.notes: Reimburses reasonable additional expenses (meals, lodging, toiletries, medication) when a Common Carrier Covered Trip is delayed more than 6 hours due to inclement weather, equipment failure, or lost/stolen passport or travel docs. Limited to $500 per Covered Trip and 2 claims per Eligible Account per 12 consecutive months. Secondary coverage; helicopter excluded.

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits — Trip Delay EOC

insurance_protection.name: Lost or Damaged Luggage
insurance_protection.notes: Reimburses Checked or Carry-on Luggage permanently Lost (missing 10 consecutive days) or Damaged on a Covered Trip charged to the Covered Card. Up to $3,000 per Covered Trip ($2,000 per bag for NY residents); 2 claims per account per 12 consecutive months. Secondary to Common Carrier and other insurance. Excludes electronics, jewelry, money, sporting equipment unless checked, and trips under 100 miles.

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits — Lost or Damaged Luggage EOC

insurance_protection.name: Damage & Theft Purchase Protection
insurance_protection.notes: Repair or reimbursement when an item paid at least in part with the Covered Card and/or ThankYou Points is damaged or stolen within 90 days of purchase or delivery (whichever is first). Up to $10,000 per incident, $50,000 per calendar year per account. Secondary coverage. Excludes vehicles, consumables, jewelry/watches, tickets, firearms, items in care of third-party shippers. Underwritten by Virginia Surety Company.

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits — Damage & Theft Purchase Protection

insurance_protection.name: Extended Warranty
insurance_protection.notes: Adds 24 additional months to a US manufacturer's warranty on items paid with the Covered Card and/or ThankYou Points. Up to $10,000 per item; total coverage capped at 7 years from purchase date. Excludes vehicles, used/antique items, items without a manufacturer's warranty. Underwritten by Virginia Surety Company.

source.label: Citi Strata Premier — Guide to Protection Benefits — Extended Warranty

disabled_or_not_offered.reason: Citi did not include cell phone protection on the Strata Premier — the issuer's Guide to Protection Benefits (effective 2024-05-12) contains only MasterRental, Trip Cancellation/Interruption, Trip Delay, Lost/Damaged Luggage, Damage & Theft Purchase Protection and Extended Warranty; no cellular wireless telephone EOC is included.
Travel Accident Insurance is not provided in the Citi Strata Premier Guide to Protection Benefits; Citi removed this coverage when relaunching the card in May 2024.

Citi packages only Lost/Damaged Luggage on the Strata Premier; a separate Baggage Delay benefit (per-day reimbursement for delayed bags, common on other World Elite cards) is not part of this card's GTPB.

Priority Pass airport lounge access is not a network-default benefit on World Elite Mastercard and is not offered by Citi on the Strata Premier; the Citi product page lists no lounge benefit (Priority Pass is reserved for Citi Strata Elite, a World Legend card).
Mastercard Easy Savings is restricted to small-business Mastercards; Citi Strata Premier is a consumer card.

issuer_overrides.what_changed: Citi extends the manufacturer's warranty by 24 months (network template typically references doubling up to a 24-month maximum extension and varies by issuer); Citi caps coverage at $10,000 per item and total coverage at 7 years from purchase date, and explicitly extends coverage to ThankYou Points redemptions on the card.

Citi raises Damage & Theft Purchase Protection to $10,000 per incident and $50,000 per calendar year per account, branded 'Damage & Theft Purchase Protection' under Virginia Surety Company. Extends eligibility to purchases made at least in part with ThankYou Points (excluding ThankYou-Points gift cards).

Citi sets explicit per-trip cap of $5,000 and $10,000 per 12-month account aggregate for Common Carrier trip cancellation/interruption, claim administration handled by Sedgwick at 1-833-251-6404, claims web portal mycardbenefits.com.

Citi caps Lost/Damaged Luggage at $3,000 per Covered Trip ($2,000 per bag for NY residents), 2 claims per 12 consecutive months; coverage is secondary and explicitly excludes baggage delay (only permanent loss/damage).

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercard cell phone protection of $800/claim and $1,000/year with $50 deductible applies to all World Elite Mastercards including Citi Strata Premier.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A cell phone protection EOC inside the Citi Strata Premier Guide to Protection Benefits PDF on cardbenefits.citi.com — currently absent.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercard Travel Accident Insurance pays up to $1,000,000 for accidental death and dismemberment.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A Travel Accident EOC in either the network's worldelite.pdf or the Citi Strata Premier GTPB. The Citi Strata Premier 2024 GTPB does not include this coverage.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercard includes baggage delay reimbursement of $100/day for up to 3 days.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A Baggage Delay EOC inside the Citi Strata Premier or current Mastercard network Guide to Benefits PDF. Citi GTPB only contains Lost/Damaged Luggage.

unverified_claims.claim: Mastercard Travel Rewards offers cashback in 25 countries with country-specific rates (e.g., 5% dining in Japan).
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: Public country-by-country earn matrix on mtr.mastercardservices.com — the public landing page requires login, so country/category cashback rates cannot be confirmed from a network deep link.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercards provide a $1,000 hotel-relocation credit under the Mastercard Hotel Stay Guarantee.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A specific dollar figure on mastercard.com or in the network GTPB — current GTPB language only states Ten Lifestyle Group will 'attempt to make it right' or 'find comparable accommodations' without a stated dollar cap.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercards include a complimentary ShopRunner membership.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A live ShopRunner enrollment landing page on mastercard.com or shoprunner.com tied to World Elite — no such page is currently surfaced from the Mastercard US World Elite benefits hub as of 2026-05-05.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercards include up to $1,000 in private-jet credits via Caledonia Jets / Vitesse partnerships.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A Mastercard.com benefit page or partner page detailing the credit; not surfaced on the current Mastercard US World Elite benefits page.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercards include a complimentary McAfee Total Protection subscription for up to 5 devices.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: A live McAfee enrollment landing page on mastercard.com — not currently surfaced from the World Elite hub.

unverified_claims.claim: World Elite Mastercards provide automatic elite status with National, Avis and Sixt rental car programs.
unverified_claims.what_would_confirm_it: Current network deep-link enrollment pages on mastercard.com; the current Mastercard US World Elite Mastercard page does not list these car-rental status benefits.
